Container.Name: Pirarara AI
Container.Overview: Pirarara AI is a self-hosted local AI platform — a lightweight alternative to Open WebUI. Named after the Pirarara (Phractocephalus hemioliopterus), the red-tailed catfish of the Amazon. [br][br] Features: [br]- Chat UI with streaming responses [br]- Multi-conversation sidebar with history [br]- Model management (pull, load, delete) [br]- Agent loop with filesystem access [br]- Workspace file viewer with terminal panel [br]- User authentication with JWT [br]- OpenAI-compatible API endpoint [br]- System stats (CPU / RAM / GPU) [br][br] Requires Ollama running on your network. No external database needed — uses SQLite internally.

Config.Name: Ollama URL
Config.Description: URL of your Ollama instance (replace with your Unraid server IP)

Config.Name: Default Model
Config.Description: Ollama model to use by default

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Random secret for JWT signing — generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Optional — for Claude models via Anthropic API

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database file is stored

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Directory where the agent can read/write files
